name: Grade 6 Mindful Movement — Semester 1
description: An 18-week Grade 6 pathway for analyzing systems, using disciplinary tools, and supporting claims through Mindful Movement. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 6 knowledge and transferable skills in analyzing systems, using disciplinary tools, and supporting claims through Mindful Movement.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.

lessons.title: Launch inquiry: analyzing systems, using disciplinary tools, and supporting claims through Mindful Movement
lessons.objective: I can develop a focused question and gather relevant evidence about analyzing systems, using disciplinary tools, and supporting claims through Mindful Movement and explain my reasoning with appropriate evidence.

activities.title: Question and evidence
activities.learnerAction: The learner develop a focused question and gather relevant evidence about analyzing systems, using disciplinary tools, and supporting claims through Mindful Movement, documents evidence in an age-appropriate format, and follows applicable safety, ethics, and collaboration expectations.

successCriteria: The learner completes a grade 6 task connected to analyzing systems, using disciplinary tools, and supporting claims through Mindful Movement.
